scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync && node scripts/patch-capacitor-proguard.cjs
scripts.cap:bundle:android: npm run cap:verify:android && node scripts/run-android-gradle.cjs clean bundleRelease
scripts.cap:release:android: npm run build && npx cap sync android && npm run cap:verify:android && node scripts/run-android-gradle.cjs clean bundleRelease
scripts.cap:icons: node scripts/ensure-icon-source.cjs && capacitor-assets generate --android --pwa --assetPath resources --iconBackgroundColor "#122a1c" --pwaManifestPath public/manifest.json && node scripts/patch-adaptive-icon.cjs
scripts.cap:play-store: node scripts/prepare-app-icon.cjs && node scripts/generate-play-feature.cjs && node scripts/verify-play-store-assets.cjs
scripts.test: node scripts/verify-locale-keys.cjs && node --test lib/*.test.js quran-ref-search.test.js quran-ayah-text-search.test.js
scripts.quran:search-index: npm run quran:meal-search-index && npm run quran:ar-ayah-search-index && npm run quran:translit-search-index
